title: go-perf-agent regression verdict
description: Base-vs-head regression result written to .go-perf-agent/runs/<id>/regression.json by `bench regression`. No code edit - it compares one benchmark at two refs. Shape mirrors internal/gate.RegressionVerdict.

status.description: regression (head slower beyond tolerance), clean (no significant regression), inconclusive (benchmark missing at a ref)

benchstat.description: the benchstat table, base vs head
